scripts.migrate:backend: docker compose run --rm -T api python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.migrate:reset:backend: docker compose run --rm -T api python -m alembic downgrade base && docker compose run --rm -T api python -m alembic upgrade head && docker compose run --rm -T api python -m database.seed
scripts.seed:backend: docker compose run --rm -T api python -m database.seed
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('fs').accessSync('.agents/skills/gluestack-ui-v4/SKILL.md')}catch(e){console.warn('\n⚠ Gluestack skills missing. Run: pnpm skills:install\n')}"
scripts.lint:backend: cd apps/apis && uv sync --extra lint --quiet && uv run --extra lint ruff check .
scripts.test:backend: cd apps/apis && uv sync --extra dev --quiet && uv run --extra dev pytest
scripts.format:backend: cd apps/apis && uv sync --extra lint --quiet && uv run --extra lint black . && uv run --extra lint ruff check --fix . && uv run --extra lint ruff format .
